title: Feature: hex live status panel in opencode right sidebar

phases.name: Research: opencode TUI plugin API shape
phases.description: Read the @opencode-ai/plugin/dist/tui.d.ts and tui.js to understand the exact slot registration API, SolidJS signal usage in @opentui/solid, and what TuiSlotContext provides (theme, dimensions). Also check how the existing opencode built-in sidebar plugins are structured in the opencode source to use as a reference pattern.

tasks.name: Document TuiSlotPlugin API and sidebar slot context
tasks.description: Read ~/.opencode/node_modules/@opencode-ai/plugin/dist/tui.d.ts in full. Find TuiSlotPlugin type (line 270), TuiSlotContext (line 266), TuiSlotMap sidebar_content shape (line 259). Determine: (1) what props sidebar_content receives, (2) how to use createSignal from @opentui/solid, (3) how to use fetch() inside a TUI plugin (or if api.client.fetch is preferred). Document findings as inline comments in the plugin template.

phases.name: Implement hex-sidebar.tsx plugin template
phases.description: Write the TSX plugin as a static template string embedded in hex-cli. The nexus URL is templated in at write time. Plugin registers into sidebar_content at order 150 using SolidJS signals for reactive data. Satisfies S01-S08, S10.

tasks.name: Write hex-sidebar.tsx plugin as embedded asset
tasks.description:
Create hex-cli/assets/plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx. The plugin:
1. Exports `{ tui: async (api) => { ... } }` as TuiPluginModule
2. Uses `createSignal` + `onMount` + `onCleanup` from '@opentui/solid'
3. On mount: fetches /api/status, /api/hexflo/swarms, /api/adrs, /api/inference/endpoints from NEXUS_URL (templated placeholder __HEX_NEXUS_URL__)
4. Sets up 30-second interval to refresh (S06)
5. Calls `api.slots.register({ order: 150, slots: { sidebar_content: () => renderHexPanel() } })`
6. Panel content (must fit 42-char width, S08):
   - Header: '⬡ hex' with project name + 8-char build hash
   - Nexus connectivity dot (green/red)
   - Swarms section: active swarms with 'N/M tasks' (S03)
   - ADRs section: 4 most recent with truncated ID + status (S04)
   - Providers section: up to 3 with live/offline indicator (S05)
   - Offline fallback: single 'nexus offline' message (S07)
7. All text truncated to 38 chars max (S08)
8. No external fetch URLs — only __HEX_NEXUS_URL__ (S10)

phases.name: hex-cli: write plugin file and register in opencode.json
phases.description: Expand write_opencode_config() in chat.rs to write .opencode/plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx with nexus URL substituted, and add plugin registration to opencode.json. Satisfies S09.

tasks.name: Write plugin file from embedded asset with nexus URL templated in
tasks.description:
In write_opencode_config() in hex-cli/src/commands/chat.rs:
1. Read the embedded asset 'plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx' via crate::assets::Assets::get_str()
2. Replace placeholder '__HEX_NEXUS_URL__' with the actual nexus_url value
3. Create .opencode/plugins/ directory in CWD if not exists
4. Write the substituted content to .opencode/plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx
5. If the asset read fails, skip silently (graceful degradation)

tasks.name: Add plugin registration to opencode.json
tasks.description:
In write_opencode_config(), add 'plugin' field to the opencode.json config object:
```json
"plugin": ["./plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx"]
```
Only add when the plugin file was written successfully. The path is relative to the opencode.json location (CWD).

phases.name: Update ADR-2603231800: mark P8 complete
phases.description: Update docs/adrs/ADR-2603231800-opencode-mcp-injection.md implementation table to mark P8 complete.

tasks.name: Mark P8 complete in ADR-2603231800
tasks.description: Update docs/adrs/ADR-2603231800-opencode-mcp-injection.md: mark P8 (hex sidebar TUI plugin) as Complete with commit hash.

riskRegister.risk: opencode TUI plugin API shape differs from type definitions — JSX element type mismatch
riskRegister.mitigation: P1.1 research phase documents exact API before writing plugin. Use 'as any' cast as fallback if types don't align exactly.

riskRegister.risk: fetch() inside @opentui/solid may not work (terminal environment, no browser APIs)
riskRegister.mitigation: Check TuiPluginApi for a built-in http method. Fall back to Node.js built-in fetch (available in Bun/Node 18+). opencode runs in Bun which has global fetch.

riskRegister.risk: SolidJS createSignal/onMount imports differ between @opentui/solid and solid-js
riskRegister.mitigation: Import strictly from '@opentui/solid' as shown in the type definitions.

riskRegister.risk: Panel text overflow breaks opencode layout at narrow terminal widths
riskRegister.mitigation: Cap all strings at 38 chars with truncation; test at 80-char terminal width.

successCriteria: opencode loads without errors and shows a hex section in the right panel
The hex panel displays project name, nexus status, active swarms, recent ADRs, and providers
The panel refreshes every 30 seconds with live nexus data
When nexus is offline, panel shows 'nexus offline' — opencode still functions normally
